name: managelm
description: Manage Linux servers from VS Code Copilot Chat

chatParticipants.name: managelm
chatParticipants.description: Manage your Linux servers through natural language

languageModelTools.name: managelm_listAgents
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all ManageLM agents (managed Linux servers) with their online/offline/pending status, health metrics (CPU, memory, disk usage), OS information, IP address, and group assignments. Use this to discover available servers before running tasks on them.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_agentInfo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get detailed information about a specific server including health metrics, OS info, LLM configuration, assigned skills, and group memberships. Use hostname or display name to identify the server.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_runTask
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a task on a server using a specific skill. The instruction is a natural language description of what to do. Common skills: base (read files, system info), system (OS config, performance), packages (install/remove/update), services (systemd, cron, logs), users (accounts, SSH keys), network (interfaces, DNS, ports), security (hardening, fail2ban, SSL), files (read/write files). Use managelm_listSkills to see all available skills.

skill.description: Skill slug (e.g. base, system, packages, services, users, network, security, files)

instruction.description: Natural language instruction describing what to do

languageModelTools.name: managelm_getTaskStatus
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the status and result of a previously submitted task by its ID. Returns status (sent, running, completed, failed, timeout), summary, error message, and whether it made changes.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_getTaskHistory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get recent task history for a server. Shows past tasks with their status, skill, summary, and timestamps.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_approveAgent
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Approve a pending agent enrollment. Use this when a new server has enrolled and needs approval to become active.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_listSkills
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all skills available in the ManageLM account. Skills define what operations can be performed on servers (e.g. packages, services, security, files). Returns skill name, slug, and description.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_agentSkills
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List skills assigned to a specific server. Shows which operations the server can perform.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_getSecurity
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get security audit findings for a server. Returns findings with severity (critical, high, medium, low, pass), category, title, explanation, and remediation suggestions.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_getInventory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get system inventory for a server. Returns installed packages, running services, containers, and system info with status and version details.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_runSecurityAudit
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Start a security audit on a server. The audit checks for vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and security best practices. Results can be retrieved with managelm_getSecurity once completed.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_runInventoryScan
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Start an inventory scan on a server. Discovers installed packages, running services, containers, and system details. Results can be retrieved with managelm_getInventory once completed.

languageModelTools.name: managelm_accountInfo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get ManageLM account information including plan details, team members, and usage limits.

managelm.apiKey.description: ManageLM API key (from Portal > Settings > MCP & API)
